channel.title: Ansible Automation Platform on @butteredhusbandph
channel.description: Recent content in Ansible Automation Platform on @butteredhusbandph

item.title: Ansible Automation Platform Installation in Virtualbox
item.description:
I’ve put together my notes on deploying Ansible Automation Platform (AAP) 2.5 on VirtualBox. This setup runs entirely on a single host using VirtualBox networking.

Host Computer Spec:

CPU:
RAM: 32 Gb
DISK: 250 Gb
OS: Redhat Enterprise Linux 9.x
Network: Virtualbox Host-Only 192.168.56.0/24

DNS server

For DNS resolution inside the lab, I’m using my existing Pi‑hole instance as the authoritative local DNS. Under Pi-hole → Settings → Local DNS Settings, I added:
